title: linaria sapphirina var. delphinioides
intro: Linaria sapphirina var. delphinioides, also known as the dwarf toadflax, is a small, annual plant species belonging to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. Its health benefits include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat respiratory issues and digestive problems.
